_notes: This example does NOT enable the proxy admin listener, so
/healthz (which lives on the admin port, default 9090) is not
reachable. The data plane's built-in liveness path is /health,
served by every sbproxy instance regardless of admin config; we
use that as the smoke runner's liveness probe.
feature_endpoints[] is empty: the real value of the example is
the 402 multi-rail body, which is not a 2xx. The Makefile's
`make test` target covers that path for hands-on validation.
skip_unless_env is a soft hint to a future smoke runner that
example will run liveness regardless. The real Stripe redemption
flow needs STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...; without it the proxy
still emits the 402 challenge body shape (the Wave 3 emission
path does not call Stripe), so liveness alone is a meaningful
audit_check stays false until Wave 2 (R1.2) ships the OSS
